policy.shared_state: Markdown and JSON artifacts, not chat memory

routes.name: Lite
routes.default_output: Return the requested artifact directly plus one verification or next step only when useful.
completion_evidence: Requested artifact is present
No non-essential route or reference was loaded
routes.handoff: Stop after the artifact unless the user asks for the next gate.

routes.name: Clarify
routes.default_output: Ask only the blocking questions, then recommend a smallest next route.
completion_evidence: Blocking unknowns are named
Next route or user decision is explicit
routes.handoff: Route to Project/MVP, Existing Project Audit, or Lite after answers arrive.

routes.name: Project/MVP
routes.default_output: Turn an idea into a scoped first version, deferred ideas, risks, and the next executable step.
completion_evidence: MVP scope is explicit
Deferred ideas or exclusions are captured
Next step is concrete
routes.handoff: Route to Engineering Delivery, AI Orchestration, or Docs/Compatibility when execution starts.

routes.name: Reference Scout
routes.default_output: Find or plan evidence-backed references, compare options, and recommend what to reuse or avoid.
completion_evidence: Sources or source gaps are named
Recommendation explains reuse, adapt, or avoid
routes.handoff: Route to Project/MVP or Engineering Delivery after a recommendation is chosen.

routes.name: Existing Project Audit
routes.default_output: Detect projects, summarize manifests/docs/tests/scripts/risks, and recommend the next gate.
completion_evidence: Workspace status is no_project, single_project, or multiple_projects
Run/test/validation evidence or gaps are named
routes.handoff: Route to Field Test Loop for Forge validation, or Engineering Delivery for project changes.

routes.name: Field Test Loop
routes.default_output: Run or plan a read-only field test, record evidence, friction, risks, and next improvements.
completion_evidence: FIELD_TEST_REPORT.md or equivalent facts are produced
Friction points are converted into next-version actions
routes.handoff: Route to Router Contract, Release Readiness, or Engineering Delivery depending on findings.

routes.name: Router Contract
routes.default_output: Define or validate route boundaries, minimum references, output contracts, evidence gates, and prompt simulations.
completion_evidence: ROUTER_CONTRACT.json validates
Representative prompts route to expected capabilities
routes.handoff: Route to Pluginization Roadmap when planning a future split, or Field Test Loop when validating real usage.

routes.name: Dual Index
routes.default_output: Create or update FORGE_INDEX.md and forge_index.json from one shared fact payload.
completion_evidence: Both human and machine indexes are written or intentionally skipped
Markdown and JSON share the same status, artifacts, risks, evidence, and next options
routes.handoff: Route to Existing Project Audit, Multi-Agent Collaboration, Field Test Loop, or Release Readiness based on indexed risks.

routes.name: Stability Gate
routes.default_output: Run or plan Forge Doctor checks across workspace evidence, dual index consistency, router corpus, agent index, field-test friction, and release readiness.
completion_evidence: FORGE_DOCTOR_REPORT.md and forge_doctor.json are written or intentionally skipped
Stable-core evidence, risks, and next options are explicit
routes.handoff: Route to Dual Index, Router Contract, Release Readiness, or Engineering Delivery based on doctor findings.

routes.name: Pluginization Roadmap
routes.default_output: Plan future router skill and child skill boundaries without splitting Forge yet.
completion_evidence: Boundaries and migration gates are explicit
No real split is performed unless separately requested
routes.handoff: Route to Router Contract before implementing any split.

routes.name: Engineering Delivery
routes.default_output: Plan or execute scoped engineering work with tests, error handling, logs, and verification.
completion_evidence: Changed behavior is verified or unverified gaps are stated
Next quality gate is named
routes.handoff: Route to Review/Submit and Docs/Compatibility after meaningful changes.

routes.name: AI Orchestration
routes.default_output: Create bounded AI work orders, acceptance checks, task queues, or rework prompts.
completion_evidence: Goal, input, output, limits, and acceptance are explicit
Executor and review loop are named
routes.handoff: Route to Multi-Agent Collaboration for multiple model roles.

routes.name: Multi-Agent Collaboration
routes.default_output: Generate human-readable collaboration plans, agent task cards, machine JSON indexes, write scopes, and acceptance loops.
completion_evidence: Each agent has role, model, goal, inputs, outputs, allowed files, forbidden files, and acceptance
AGENT_INDEX.json validates when produced
routes.handoff: Route to Review/Submit or Field Test Loop for validation.

routes.name: Review/Submit
routes.default_output: Review changes by risk, check verification evidence, and decide submit readiness.
completion_evidence: Findings are ordered by severity
Submit verdict is explicit
routes.handoff: Route to Release Readiness when publishing or tagging is next.

routes.name: Docs/Compatibility
routes.default_output: Produce or review real-user docs, install paths, API/CLI surfaces, and compatibility notes.
completion_evidence: Run/install/verify path is clear
Known platform gaps are named
routes.handoff: Route to Release Readiness for public publishing.

routes.name: Release Readiness
routes.default_output: Check validation, packaging hygiene, changelog, docs, git status, tag, release risks, and next steps.
completion_evidence: Validation commands are named with outcomes
Release/tag readiness is explicit
routes.handoff: Route to Review/Submit if code changed, then publish only after explicit user intent.

routes.name: Automation
routes.default_output: Offer 2-3 execution routes, selected task queues, confirmation gates, and verification after each batch.
completion_evidence: Options are concrete
Risk actions require confirmation
routes.handoff: Route to Engineering Delivery, AI Orchestration, or Review/Submit as batches complete.

routes.name: Work Summary
routes.default_output: Close non-trivial work with a concise summary or stakeholder report when explicitly requested.
completion_evidence: Done, produced, verification, risk, and next step are covered
Skip summary when the user explicitly asks to skip
routes.handoff: Stop or route to the next gate named in the summary.
